footer.about: vivahaa is India's premium wedding planning platform — curating venues, vendors and rituals into one seamless celebration.

hero.eyebrow: From 40 Phone Calls to One Dashboard
hero.title: Every Ritual, Every Rupee, Beautifully Arranged
hero.subtitle: From the first haldi to the final vidaai, we line up the venues, vendors and artisans — so your own family finally gets to attend this wedding as guests, not staff.

hero.title: Every Wedding Should Still Feel Like Yours

story.title: A Platform Born From 1,000 Family Weddings
story.p1: vivahaa started in 2019, when three friends — a wedding photographer, an event planner and a software engineer — kept hearing the same complaint from every family: planning an Indian wedding meant forty phone calls, a dozen spreadsheets, and never quite knowing if the budget actually added up.
story.p2: So we built the platform we wished existed: one place to discover venues, compare vendors, plan every ritual and track the budget — in English or Hindi, from a phone or a laptop.
story.p3: Today our planners and engineers work with families in 60-plus cities. The goal hasn't moved an inch: give every couple enough clarity to actually enjoy their own wedding.

values.title: Our Values
values.v1Desc: We design around your customs and traditions, never around a template.
values.v2Desc: Every rupee is itemised. No hidden vendor commissions, ever.
values.v3Desc: Every venue and vendor is site-visited and background-checked.
values.v4Desc: A dedicated planner is one message away, right up to the big day.

team.title: The People Behind Your Celebration
team.subtitle: A close-knit team of planners, designers and relationship managers.

why.title: What Keeps Families Coming Back
why.w1: Pan-India network of verified venues & vendors
why.w2: Transparent, itemised budgeting in real time
why.w4: Dedicated relationship manager for every booking
why.w6: 24x7 support in the final week before your wedding

hero.title: Wedding Services
hero.subtitle: Every service your celebration needs — coordinated by one team.

services.s1Desc: Palaces, five-star banquets, destination resorts and intimate lawns, shortlisted to your guest count, city and budget.
services.s2Desc: Vegetarian, non-vegetarian, Jain, vegan and regional menus with live tasting sessions before you decide.
services.s3Desc: Mandap design, floral installations, lighting and theme styling from classic Rajwada to modern minimal.
services.s4Desc: Candid photography, cinematic wedding films, drone coverage and same-day highlight reels.
services.s5Desc: Live sufi and folk bands, professional DJs, and sangeet choreographers for every generation on the dance floor.
services.s6Desc: Makeup artists, mehendi designers, sherwani & lehenga stylists, and jewellery consultants.
services.s7Desc: Digital e-invites, hand-crafted boxed invitations, and personalised return gifts for guests.
services.s8Desc: Digital RSVPs, seating charts, hotel blocks and airport transfers for out-of-town guests.
services.s9Desc: A live wedding planner with real-time cost tracking, so you always know where you stand.

process.title: From First Click to Final Vow
process.step1Desc: Share your city, dates, guest count and style preferences.
process.step2Desc: We match venues and vendors to your budget and your taste — not the other way around.
process.step3Desc: Fine-tune every detail with your dedicated planner.
process.step4Desc: We coordinate every vendor on the day so you don't have to.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: How far in advance should we start planning?
faq.a1: We recommend starting 6–9 months before your wedding date for the best choice of venues and vendors, though we've successfully planned celebrations in as little as 6 weeks.
faq.q2: Does vivahaa charge couples a planning fee?
faq.a2: Our venue and vendor discovery tools are completely free to use. A planning fee applies only if you choose a dedicated vivahaa planner for full-service coordination.
faq.q3: Can I customise a package after booking?
faq.a3: Yes — every package is a starting point. You can add, remove or upgrade any service at any time before your final payment milestone.
faq.q4: Which cities does vivahaa operate in?
faq.a4: We currently operate across 60+ cities in India, including all major metros and popular destination-wedding locations like Jaipur, Udaipur and Goa.
faq.a5: All payments are held in escrow and released to vendors only at agreed milestones, so you're always protected.
